CVE-2015-2785.title: The GIF encoder in Byzanz allows remote attackers to cause a deni ...
CVE-2015-2785.description: The GIF encoder in Byzanz allows remote attackers to cause a denial of service (out-of-bounds heap write and crash) or possibly execute arbitrary code via a crafted Byzanz debug data recording (ByzanzRecording file) to the byzanz-playback command.
